septal
  • API reference
  • Factory
  • View page source

Factory

High-level factory for parametric and batched SQP solves.

Usage — single solve

factory = ParametricSQPFactory(problem, cfg) result = factory.solve(x0, p)

Usage — batched solve (GPU-accelerated)

results = factory.solve_batch(x0_batch, params_batch) # results.decision_variables has shape (N, n) # results.success has shape (N,)

Usage — pre-compiled batch solve

solve = factory.compile_batch(N) # traces + compiles once results = solve(x0_batch, params_batch) results = solve(x0_batch2, params_batch2) # fast: no recompilation

class septal.jax.sqp.factory.ParametricSQPFactory(problem, cfg=None)[source]

Bases: object

Factory for single and batched parametric SQP solves.

Parameters:

  • problem (ParametricNLPProblem) – Parametric NLP problem definition.

  • cfg (SQPConfig | None) – SQP solver configuration. Defaults to SQPConfig if None.

compile_batch(N)[source]

AOT-trace and compile the batched solver for batch size N.

Returns a callable that accepts (x0_batch, params_batch) and returns an SQPResult without re-compilation on subsequent calls.

Parameters:

N (int) – Batch size to compile for.

Returns:

(x0_batch: (N, n), params_batch: (N, m)) -> SQPResult

Return type:

Callable

classmethod from_nlp_problem(problem, n_params, cfg=None)[source]

Construct from an existing NLPProblem.

The NLP’s objective and constraint functions must accept a second argument p (the parameter vector), even if they ignore it. This is the standard way to convert an existing parametric JAX function.

Parameters:

  • problem (NLPProblem) – Non-parametric NLP. Its objective and constraints callables must accept (x, p) signatures.

  • n_params (int) – Dimension of the parameter vector.

  • cfg (SQPConfig | None) – SQP configuration.

Return type:

ParametricSQPFactory

initial_guess()[source]

Generate a single Sobol-sequence initial guess within bounds.

Return type:

Array

solve(x0, p, use_while_loop=False)[source]

Solve a single parametric NLP instance.

Parameters:

  • x0 (Array) – Initial guess, shape (n,).

  • p (Array) – Parameter vector, shape (m,).

  • use_while_loop (bool) – If True use the while-loop variant (early exit); otherwise use the scan-based variant (fixed iterations, vmappable).

Return type:

SQPResult

solve_batch(x0_batch, params_batch)[source]

Solve N parametric NLPs simultaneously via jax.vmap.

Parameters:

  • x0_batch (Array) – Initial guesses, shape (N, n). Pass (n,) to broadcast the same guess to all N problems.

  • params_batch (Array) – Parameter vectors, shape (N, m).

Returns:

All array fields have a leading batch dimension N.

Return type:

SQPResult

SQPResult field reference

Field

Single solve

Batched

Description

success

bool

(N,)

KKT tolerances satisfied

objective

scalar

(N,)

\(f(x^*, p)\)

decision_variables

(n,)

(N, n)

\(x^*\)

multipliers

(n_g,)

(N, n_g)

\(\lambda^*\)

constraints

(n_g,)

(N, n_g)

\(g(x^*, p)\)

kkt_stationarity

scalar

(N,)

Projected-gradient stationarity residual

kkt_feasibility

scalar

(N,)

L∞ constraint violation at \(x^*\)

iterations

int

(N,)

Iterations used

timing

float

float

Wall-clock seconds

message

str

str

"converged" or "max_iter reached"
